title: datura dolichocarpa
intro: Datura dolichocarpa, also known as long-fruited thornapple, is a species of poisonous plant in the nightshade family. The medicinal properties of Datura dolichocarpa include its ability to induce sedation, relieve pain, and reduce anxiety, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to treat insomnia, epilepsy, and other neurological disorders, as well as its use in traditional medicine to induce sweating and relieve respiratory issues. Datura dolichocarpa can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, but caution is advised due to its toxicity and potential for abuse.
